segments.description: High-intensity cinematic trailer music featuring dramatic orchestral swells, electronic pulses, and percussive hits, layered with intense dialogue and sound effects.
High-intensity, action-oriented trailer music with driving percussion, electronic synth pulses, and dramatic orchestral swells.
Intense, high-energy rock music with aggressive vocals and dramatic sound effects.
High-intensity cinematic trailer music with dramatic orchestral stabs, heavy percussion, and sound effects.
High-energy, cinematic action trailer music with intense sound effects and a promotional voiceover.

summary: The trailer maintains high intensity, combining dramatic, action-oriented cinematic music with promotional voiceover and sound effects.
